comment: State file for the daily news routine. Maps source id to the most recently seen item id or timestamp. The agent updates this on every successful run.

mcp-blog.note: feed returned 404 on 2026-05-13; logged to fetch-errors.jsonl

lmarena-blog.note: feed at blog.lmarena.ai/feed.xml 301-redirects to arena.ai/blog/feed.xml; sources.yaml entry may need a human update

apple-security-blog.note: feed returned 404 on 2026-05-13; logged to fetch-errors.jsonl

grants_watch_frontier-model-forum-update.note: Latest visible item is an information-sharing agreement, not a grant. No grant candidates queued from this source.

grants_watch_nlnet-news.note: Queued three candidates: 44-project March cohort, NLnet's Horizon Europe selection, Proton Foundation donation. April 57-project cohort already in grants.yaml.

grants_watch_nsf-news-ai.note: nsf.gov/news/index.jsp?org=NSF returned 202 with empty body; used /news/ landing as fallback. Queued $11M K-12 AI PD as low-confidence on-topic candidate.

grants_watch_schmidt-sciences-opportunit.note: Visible opportunities listing had no AI-specific open calls beyond what is already represented in funders.yaml.

grants_watch_schmidt-sciences-announceme.note: Queued AI at Work $3M+ awards (Jan 27, 2026). Other recent items were climate/astrophysics.

grants_watch_mozilla-foundation-press.note: Queued one low-confidence editorial post about future grantmaking. No specific award announcements visible.

grants_watch_mozilla-builders-blog.note: https://builders.mozilla.org/blog/ returned HTTP 404 on 2026-05-13; logged to fetch-errors.jsonl.

grants_watch_sovereign-tech-agency-news.note: Site has moved from sovereigntechfund.de to sovereign.tech for article URLs. Queued 2026 Fellowship open call and Resilience tender; sources.yaml feed URL still works but article links resolve to sovereign.tech.

grants_watch_anthropic-news-funding.note: Recent posts are product/partnership/compute announcements, not grants. Project Glasswing (Apr 7, 2026) is a consortium initiative, not a grant program. No candidates queued.

grants_watch_openai-index-funding.note: https://openai.com/index/ returned HTTP 403 on 2026-05-13; https://openai.com/news/ also 403. Logged to fetch-errors.jsonl.

grants_watch_lf-aaif-blog.note: Recent posts are project releases (ONNX, TrustyAI, Open Voice). No grant announcements identified.

grants_watch_open-philanthropy-grants.note: https://www.openphilanthropy.org/grants/ returned HTTP 403 on 2026-05-13 (likely Cloudflare). Also tried /giving/grants?focus-area=potential-risks-advanced-ai with same result. Logged to fetch-errors.jsonl; needs alternative scrape strategy.

grants_watch_ai2-blog-funding.note: Recent Ai2 blog posts are model/product releases (EMO, MolmoAct 2, AstaBench, OlmoEarth). No funding posts in window.

grants_watch_huggingface-blog-grants.note: Recent HF posts are model/feature/leaderboard releases. No community-grant announcements in the 15-item window.

grants_watch_granted-ai.note: Visible items are domain-general grants (education, health, climate, agriculture). No AI-stack-relevant grants surfaced.

grants_watch_opportunity-desk.note: Visible items are fellowships and grants in development, education, climate. None AI-stack-relevant in the listing window.

grants_watch_ea-forum-grants.note: https://forum.effectivealtruism.org/tag/grants/feed.xml returned HTTP 404 on 2026-05-13. Logged to fetch-errors.jsonl.

grants_watch_lesswrong-funding.note: Queued MATS Autumn 2026 fellowship as a 'new' candidate funder. Other recent funding-tagged posts were research write-ups.

grants_watch_eu-horizon-news.note: Recent items are policy and regulation. NLnet's Horizon Europe Open Internet Stack selection captured via the nlnet-news source instead.

grants_watch_aisi-uk-grants.note: AISI grants page now references an AISI Challenge Fund (priority areas, application pack PDFs) distinct from the Alignment Project. Queued for human verification.
